features: SOOTHING ORIENTAL RUB: Masterplast Oriental Balm warms on contact to help soothe tired muscles. Ideal after a long shift, gym session or a chilly winter walk.
WARMING MASSAGING BALM: This warming massaging balm melts as it’s rubbed in, so it spreads fast without tugging the skin. Use on shoulders or calves when they feel tight.
MUSCLE PAIN RELIEF COMFORT: The menthol and camphor scent gives that classic cooling-then-warming feel. Reach for it after gardening, DIY or a day on your feet.
EASY TO APPLY BALM TEXTURE: The smooth balm is easy to apply and a little goes a long way. Pop it in a drawer or gym bag for quick, no-fuss relief anytime.
TARGETED USE: Massage into arms, back or legs 1–2 times daily as required. Perfect post-run, after football, or when desk posture makes muscles grumpy.
AROMATIC OILS EXPERIENCE: With clove, eucalyptus, cedar and nutmeg oils for a bold, spa-like rub. Great for winding down in the evening after a busy day.
NO MESS: This easy to apply balm is thick enough to stay put, so it won’t run down skin mid-massage. Great for an evening wind down on the shoulders or calves, then settle in feeling warm and comfy.
MASTERPLAST TRUSTED ESSENTIAL: Masterplast brings a dependable warming rub that fits everyday life. Keep one at home and one at work for muscle comfort on demand.
HOW TO USE SAFELY: For external use only and avoid eyes or broken skin. Stop if irritation occurs, and keep away from delicate clothing to prevent marks.
FAMILY STORAGE & CAUTIONS: Not suitable during pregnancy or for children under 6 years old. Store at room temperature, out of sunlight, and keep out of reach of kids.
description: Product Description When muscles start feeling tense, comfort should be quick and easy. Masterplast Oriental Balm is a warming, easy to apply Oriental Rub made for everyday routine. Whether it’s post-work tension, post-gym stiffness, or that “why did I lift that?” moment after DIY. This warming massaging balm melts as it’s rubbed into the skin, helping it glide on smoothly without the messy drips of a cream. Just massage into the area and let the warming sensation get to work, soothing muscle aches and supporting muscle pain relief. The classic blend of menthol and camphor gives a cooling then warming sensation, while aromatic oils like clove, eucalyptus, cedar and nutmeg add a bold, spa like scent that makes the massage feel like a proper wind-down. Keep it by the sofa for evening shoulder rubs, in a gym bag for after training, or in a desk drawer for those long screen days when the neck and back need a little TLC. Use 1–2 times daily as required. Ingredients Petrolatum, Menthol, Camphor, Paraffin, Eugenia Carypphyllus (Clove) Leaf Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Cedrus Atlantica (Cedar) Bark Oil, Myristica Fragrans (Nutmeg) Kernal Oil, Methyl Salicylate, CI 26100, CI 61565, CI 47005, Limonene, Eugenol, Isoeugenol. Directions Store at room temperature away from direct sunlight. Safety Warning Use only as directed. For external use only. Do not apply to broken skin or near eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not suitable for use during pregnancy. Not suitable for children under 6 years old. Avoid contact with delicate clothing. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately and show this container or label. See more
